notes: Positions from the LED-button production CSV + Edge_Cuts gerber (2026-06-22); board 20x20. JST J1/J2 IDENTICAL to the buzzer/knob -> buzzer housing template applies (connectors verified). This board uses the noknok M2.5 mounting standard, but only one hole (H1) is CSV-tagged (17.75, 2.25). Payload = Cherry MX-style keyboard switch (SW1, THT) with an SK6812MINI-E RGB backlight (D1). clearance_top=11.6 = switch height above the PCB (per datasheet + Christopher); THT pins protrude 2.7 mm on the bottom. switch outer 15.9x15.7, plate-mount section 14x14. top_feature = 14x14 button opening. CONFIRMED (Christopher): switch centred at (10,10) - SK6812 LED sits 5 mm north at (10,15); and SIMPLE OPENING chosen (top cover sits above the switch with a 14x14 hole, keycap presses through) rather than the keyboard-plate clip-in. clearance_bottom: more bottom-side parts than buzzer/knob (MT3540 boost U2, inductor L1) - 3.0 is socket-governed, verify on print.
